name: @kumikitools/editor
description: Kumiki A/B visual editor (F2) — a bookmarklet overlay that runs on the user's real page, picks elements, generates stability-ranked selectors, and posts the changes[] back to the dashboard. Not an iframe: many sites (incl. production storefronts) send X-Frame-Options, so the picker is injected into the live page instead (ARCH §9.7).
